CVE-2023-52355.244491fa800131fe92684212ad55fae0da4bb82b:
Mark CVE-2023-52355 as mitigated in third_party/libtiff/METADATA

Since there are no callers to TIFFRasterScanlineSize() and
TIFFRasterScanlineSize64() in this code base, the potential OOM issue
cannot occur.
